rationale: The citing paper is explicitly framed as extending prior marketing placebo theory and identifies moderators (reward, somatosensory, cognitive) that closely match the cited paper’s conceptual agenda on expectancies, beliefs, and boundary conditions. Given this direct theoretical continuity between "Individual Differences in Marketing Placebo Effects" and the cited conceptual framework "Ruminating about Placebo Effects of Marketing Actions" (matched by DOI), this is plausibly a substantive foundational/theory-use citation rather than an incidental mention.
